response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video content as a countdown/intro sequence for a Hololive event. 2. Identified the musical performance starting at 02:06 as 'FG ROADSTER' by the group FLOW GLOW, using on-screen text for title and production credits. 3. Used web search to confirm song metadata (Original composers: Pocyomukin, LUNA, Joe Ogawa, Foux) and found full lyrics. 4. Segregated the video into two main scenes: the intro sequence and the musical performance. 5. Constructed the JSON response with all detected metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional showcase for the 'hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025-2026', featuring a fast-paced sequence introducing various Hololive generations, leading into a full musical performance of the song 'FG ROADSTER' by the group FLOW GLOW.

scenes.description: An introductory sequence with a countdown and glimpses of various Hololive generations. No vocal music is playing.
The group FLOW GLOW performs their song 'FG ROADSTER' on a virtual stage. Credits appear for the song's production.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Packin' a v8 engine
And a seventh sense for things
Six ways to sunday, the world'll be rocking
With us five, the game be changing
Burn the four wheels floor the pedal
Thank you all three-fold, sarang hae yo
Spinning two turntables like a pro
Becoming number one, starting here, ground zero
Ayy, face the risks and stand up
The come with chances, you can't mess up
Going to the top, all the way up
We even bring the laughs in stand-up
Jumping into a fg roadster
We got a special unit full of espers
We make history the world's a beholder
Leaving in the dust, anyone slower
Speeding through the stratosphere
Our jet engines' thrusting, the flamboyance of pioneers
Below us, the world unfolding, crossing the tropics down there
Seeing the big blue in the rare view, ibm (fire!)
Taking off from the launch pad, this is our generation
Our tanks won't ever empty, be glad
We wanna eat sushi in a space station
We got a massive vision
All of us burning with passion
And as of this moment
We're going above and beyond
Dreams come true, we won't stop, our hearts are a monster
